creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 155483
patch

Currently tor doesn't support ipfw(8) at all (for their TransPort).

I submitted the same patch to tor 2 years ago, but it looks like it got forgotten, and that bug was closed there. (Now I reopened it again)

I suggest to add this patch to the port patch-set until upstream finally catches up.

TorProject ticket for reference: https://trac.torproject.org/projects/tor/ticket/10267
